metadata.title: Engineering Model Go Repository Architecture POA&M

poam-items.title: Add fuzz coverage for MCP path normalization
poam-items.description: Add fuzz coverage for MCP path normalization

poam-items.title: Enforce strict trace coverage in the CI gate
poam-items.description: Enforce strict trace coverage in the CI gate

risks.title: MCP path traversal exposes non-repository files
risks.description: An attacker uses crafted MCP path arguments to read files outside the repository workspace.
risks.statement: Path boundary enforcement and strict input schemas reduce exposure to low residual risk.

risks.title: Traceability drift weakens assurance evidence
risks.description: Code and tests evolve without updating requirement trace markers, eroding coverage evidence.
risks.statement: Strict code-linking coverage and inferred verification keep drift detectable.

risks.title: Stale generated artifacts misrepresent the system
risks.description: Generated documentation or exchange artifacts fall out of sync with the authored model.
risks.statement: Determinism plus staleness checks make drift visible; residual risk accepted between regenerations.
